Correlation and Analysis Summary
Target: note_bert_intimité (Intimacy)

--- Correlations ---
Language Richness: r=0.450, rho=0.414
Fluency: r=0.495, rho=0.474
Emotions: r=0.560, rho=0.612
Imagination: r=0.460, rho=0.456
Expertise: r=0.240, rho=0.223
Vulnerability: r=0.295, rho=0.331
Difficulty of Verbalisation: r=0.077, rho=0.168

--- Generated Files ---
- vif_analysis.csv: Check multicollinearity (VIF > 5 is high)
- residuals_analysis.png/svg: Check model errors
- shap_clustering_profiles.png/svg: Intimacy type segmentation
- shap_interaction.png/svg: Interaction effects between factors
- data_with_stats.csv: Input CSV with cluster and residual columns
- cluster_means_heatmap.png/svg: Matrix of mean factors and intimacy per cluster
- stat_par_entretien.csv: Aggregated stats by filename
